contexts.context: ...8.  Young was born in 1683 at his father's <mark>rectory</mark> at Upham, near Winchester, a cathedral city...
...steady source of income until he was granted the <mark>rectory</mark> of Welwyn, Hertfordshire, in 1730. Back...
..., he was presented by Mr. Skrine to the <mark>rectory</mark> of Claverton, on which he resided very constantly...
